name: spice-team-skills
description: Spice Digital team skills marketplace — per-function plugins for marketplaces, retention, design, operations, and the shared org context.

plugins.name: spice-team-skills
plugins.description: Shared Spice org context + utility skills. Keep installed by every teammate. (The per-function plugins below are siblings, not replacements yet — soft migration.)

plugins.name: spice-marketplaces
plugins.description: Delivery marketplace operations — UE/DD/GH weekly reporting, campaign ops, client diagnostics, storefront audits, menu work, ratings reply, scorecard. For Growth Managers and support analysts.

plugins.name: spice-retention
plugins.description: Retention service operations for MBFS, HealthNut, and Ahipoki across Thanx, Toast, Klaviyo, and SMS. Briefs, monthly reports, meeting prep, health checks, flow design, QA checklist, segments + subject lines, and the Ahipoki Klaviyo migration. For the Retention Lead.

plugins.name: spice-design
plugins.description: Design briefs and creative production for Spice Digital clients. Built for Dilli Dias and anyone briefing design work. Includes the ratings flyer brief and the email template designer.

plugins.name: spice-operations
plugins.description: Back-office operations — client onboarding, onboarding status tracking. Designed to grow: finance, HR, sales, admin skills will land here as they get extracted.
